metadata_source: local apt-cache package and source metadata from the Ubuntu 24.04 repositories configured on this system
selection_policy: Representative direct dependents on libpng runtime package (libpng16-16t64) and/or development package (libpng-dev). This list is intentionally diverse rather than exhaustive.

dependents.name: GIMP
dependents.runtime_functionality: Opening, editing, and exporting PNG images.

dependents.name: LibreOffice Draw
dependents.runtime_functionality: Importing, rendering, and exporting PNG images inside drawings and related office documents.

dependents.name: Scribus
dependents.runtime_functionality: Placing PNG images into page layouts for publishing output.

dependents.name: WebKitGTK
dependents.runtime_functionality: Decoding and rendering PNG images referenced by web pages and other embedded web content.

dependents.name: GDK Pixbuf
dependents.runtime_functionality: Loading and saving PNG pixbufs for GTK and GNOME software.

dependents.name: Cairo
dependents.runtime_functionality: PNG-backed raster surfaces and PNG output support for software built on Cairo.

dependents.name: SDL2_image
dependents.category: game and multimedia image codec library
dependents.runtime_functionality: Loading PNG images as SDL surfaces.

dependents.name: Netpbm
dependents.runtime_functionality: Converting images to and from PNG, including via tools such as pnmtopng.

dependents.name: XSane
dependents.runtime_functionality: Launching XSane in PNG save mode against the SANE test backend and verifying that the device window comes up and stays alive under Xvfb.

dependents.name: R png package
dependents.runtime_functionality: Reading, writing, and displaying PNG images from R.

dependents.name: pngquant
dependents.runtime_functionality: Quantizing and recompressing PNG images into smaller palette-based PNGs.
